briefs.title: BC Horse Racing Regulation takes effect April 2026 — new betting and licensing rules
briefs.summary: BC's Gaming Control Act General Manager has created a new Horse Racing Regulation, effective April 13, 2026. It sets rules for betting types, licence classes, and when a licensee is considered to have an interest in a horse.
briefs.action_required: Review the new Horse Racing Regulation before April 13, 2026 to ensure your licences and betting practices comply.

key_dates.label: BC Horse Racing Regulation takes effect — Gaming Control Act
